title: DESdecrypt
text: DESdecrypt Decode 8 bytes of data in DES format extern void DESencrypt(const unsigned char * Value , unsigned char * DESkey , long Decrypted ); Parameters Parameter Direction Description Value IN 8 bytes of encrypted data that is to be decoded DESkey IN 8 byte DES key that is to be used to decode Value Decrypted OUT Result, also 8 bytes in length Use Library uenc Description This function is useful for creating security drivers that need to encode and decode data.
